title: Jatileswar Siva temple
tagline: Jatileswar Siva temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Jatileswar Temple (Bengali: জটিলেশ্বর মন্দির) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.
overview.description: Jatileswar Temple (Bengali: জটিলেশ্বর মন্দির) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. The temple located in Maynaguri of the Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Jalpesh Temple
topPlaces.description: Jalpesh Temple (Rangpuri: zolpeś mondir, Bengali: jolpeś mondir) is an important Hindu temple dedicated to the Bhramari Saktipitha's Bhairava as Jalpesh. The worshiped in this temple is Bhairava as Jalpesh, a form of Shiva – one of Hinduism's trinity of supreme divinity.

topPlaces.name: Dakshin Khagrabari
topPlaces.description: Dakshin Khagrabari is a census town in the Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Mainaguri
topPlaces.description: Mainaguri (also spelled Maynaguri) is a town and a municipality in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India. The town is located on the banks of the Jarda River.

items.note: Jalpesh Temple (Rangpuri: zolpeś mondir, Bengali: jolpeś mondir) is an important Hindu temple dedicated to the Bhramari Saktipitha's Bhairava as Jalpesh. The worshiped in this temple is Bhairava as Jalpesh, a form of Shiva – one of Hinduism's trinity of supreme divinity.
Dakshin Khagrabari is a census town in the Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

Mainaguri (also spelled Maynaguri) is a town and a municipality in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India. The town is located on the banks of the Jarda River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jatileswar Siva temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jatileswar Siva temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jatileswar Siva temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bagdogra Airport (Siliguri/Darjeeling) (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jatileswar Siva temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jatileswar Siva temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jatileswar Siva temple?
faq.a: Stays in Jatileswar Siva temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jatileswar Siva temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jalpesh Temple, Dakshin Khagrabari, Mainaguri.
